description: From kooky crafts to word-play creations and silly games, Gaga for Googles includes over 100 fun ideas and things to do with googly eyes. You'll go Gaga for Googles over the collection of fun ideas and things to do with googly eyes in this interactive kit. This fun art kit focuses on one craft item--googly eyes--and showcases over 100 googly eye uses and applications! From kooky crafts to word-play creations and silly games, this kit has it all! Gaga for Googles comes with a variety of shapes, sizes, and colors of googly eyes to help get your art projects started. Read more
